violations.text: Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Establishment is to label all spray bottles. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

The doors to the outside, located in the left main entrance and meat area, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2026
Various food was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer and prep station. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
Establishment was observed marinating pork in non-food grade containers. Establishment is to use food grade container only. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface cardboard box between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

The cutting boards in the produce area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2026
The walk-in cooler, walk-in freezer, and retail refrigeration gaskets were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
Establishment is lacking proper drain plugs for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain drain plugs New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and storage bins have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
The outside refuse area was observed with an accumulation of debris. Refuse areas must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
The floor in the walk-in cooler area is in poor repair with exposed wood. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC added chlorine, service is expected to come tomorrow. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024

The door to the outside, located in the front (side door), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024

Inspector observed food for sale (fruit pops) that originated from a home kitchen, per interview with manager. Food shall be obtained from sources that comply with Food Law, and food prepared in a private home may not be used or offered for human consumption in a food establishment. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2024
Integrity of corn masala packaging observed compromised. Inspector observed item wrapped in plastic wrap covering the bag that was previously torn. See disposal. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2024

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arrranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. Informed PIC to manually add sanitizer, until sanitizer dispenser is serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2024

Display case is lacking a consumer advisory. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024

The door to the outside, located in the front (side door), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2024
The presence of rats outside is not controlled as evidenced by numerous burrows by dumpster. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
Numerous foods were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in coolers shelving have an accumulation of meat residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
